productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Coffee Brown Wallets
description: Urban girls can't get enough of bold accents and this is the key to a memorable look. Update your wardrobe with this stylish wallet from United Colours Of Benetton. Dimensions: 13.5 cm X 3.5 cmMade of 70% polyester and 30% polyurethane for durabilityHas one main zippered compartment and one front compartmentFour credit card slots and one mesh id card slot on the right sideFour slip pockets on either side for essentials Leather flap with metallic clasp and button closure; Brand name on clasp One back compartment with leather mouth and button closureCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
